svg.title: Robotic Manipulation Learning Concept Illustration
svg.desc: 07 Segmentation to Grasp. A mask selects the target points before downstream grasp proposals are ranked.
svg.metadata: Canonical Colab concept asset. Generated by tools/generate_colab_svg_illustrations.py. Visual system: cool engineering paper, restrained robotics palette, shared line widths, large readable primitives, no photo textures, no random image-generation artifacts. Use the SVG as the source of truth; PNG exports are for notebook and static site display.
svg.text: A mask selects the target points before downstream grasp proposals are ranked.
